narrative:
Ottawa Twp. West (precinct in Putnam County) has 775 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 39.5 percentage points.
